title: roadmap backlog.yaml
description: The erratic-work tracker beside the roadmap: follow-ups, bugs, chores, urgent items that surface outside the planned feature/value work. Items are directly launchable (roadmap grab <id>) or promotable into a roadmap sprint (roadmap promote <id> --pi <pi>). BACKLOG.md is generated from this file.

id.description: Stable item slug (auto b1..bN when omitted at add). Becomes the sprint invoke key on promote and the grab branch backlog/<id>.

source.description: Where this surfaced: the slice that spawned it, when, and a note

slice.description: Invoke key of the slice this fell out of

touches.description: Files this item writes (grab uses it for the brief scope)

prompt.description: Author-stashed pickup instructions, embedded verbatim in the grab kickoff brief

promoted_to.description: pi-id/sprint-id nodeKey written by promote; the back-link to the roadmap
